chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 931 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.12.2023 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Same was the position on last three dates of hearing. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
